title: medicago minima var. recta
intro: Medicago minima var. recta, also known as small bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Medicago minima var. recta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
